items.required_signal: profile links and first-batch publication not complete
items.required_value: Allowed while launch is incomplete; do not make commercial decisions.
items.allowed_action: Set profile links, publish first batch, backfill post URL and minimum KPI.
items.blocked_action: Change offer order, paid CTA, Luna emphasis, affiliate emphasis, or winning guardian.

items.required_value: At least the configured scale-content quiz completion threshold and acceptable completion rate. Current threshold: 10 quiz completions.
items.allowed_action: Publish more variants for the strongest guardian or pain point while keeping quiz CTA.
items.blocked_action: Treat content interest as proof of purchase intent.

items.required_value: Any guardian result, route, keepsake, or resource interest after weekly gate is ready.
items.allowed_action: Improve free keepsakes, story cards, share images, and result-route assets.
items.blocked_action: Move the primary CTA directly to paid products.

items.required_value: Any supply lead, contact request, or explicit downloadable asset request.
items.allowed_action: Build one low-risk email/download asset for the signaled guardian or route.
items.blocked_action: Build a paid product before repeated lead evidence exists.

items.required_value: Any Luna pack, affiliate book, or other revenue-route click after result-route context.
items.allowed_action: Test a soft result-route offer; keep Shorts and profile CTAs focused on the quiz.
items.blocked_action: Use direct sales language in first-touch Shorts or profile bio.
